creator: marc.vanwoerkom@science-factory.com
text:
Two updates:

1. I will send a corrected version for better compliance to the
   ports standards (your folk's improvements) later this day.

2. I am working on the 

        linux-q3asdk 

   port (based on linuxq3sdk-1.1.x86.run) - if someone
   has some experience with it, I would love to hear about
   it. I hope to get it finished today or tomorrow.

Happy Christmas,
Marc
